briefdescription.para: This function Clears Uart terminal screen.
This function is called when the GT reset is done and it starts SDI Tx Subsystem.
This function is called when the RX Lock occurs, it calculates the frequency wrt RxTransMode, programs SI5324 with the calculated frequency and then enables Rx stream flow IPs.
This function is called when the RX looses lock, and it stops SDI Tx Subsystem.
This function is called when the any exception occurs.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when assertion hits in the file.

parameterdescription.para: is line number of the function caller.
- File name where assertion occurred. Line - Line number in this file.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to start the TX stream after the RX stream was up and running.
Set the output frequency of the Si570 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.
is the input reference clock that can be either of FREQ_SI570_148_5_MHz, FREQ_SI570_148_35_MHz

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure, SI5324_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated, SI5324_ERR_PARM when the ClkSrc or ClkDest parameters are invalid or the ClkInFreq or ClkOutFreq are out of range.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si570 device.
contains the value to be written in Si570 register for that particular clock frequency.

simplesect.para: SI570_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated
SI570_ERR_PARM when the ClkSrc or ClkDest parameters are invalid or the ClkInFreq or ClkOutFreq are out of range.

briefdescription.para: This function outputs the video information on TX and RX.
This function outputs the debug information.
Main function to call example with SDI TX and SDI RX drivers.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if SDI example was successfully.
